assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Systematic force-upgrade to 1.31' for Regular channel clusters with emphasis that there's 'No way to avoid' except temporary exclusion

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Extended support continues until ~Q2 2026 (24 months total)' and 'you get an additional ~12 months' compared to standard EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: States 'Systematic force-upgrade to 1.31' and 'Both control plane AND node pools upgraded automatically' with warning that 'Per-nodepool exclusions ignored during EoS enforcement'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions '30-day no upgrades exclusion' as option for all cluster types and describes it as 'Last-Minute Deferral' with 30-day limitation

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Recommends 'Option A: Proactive Manual Upgrade (Recommended)' and emphasizes benefits of 'Full control over timing, validation, and rollback options'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Does not mention Cloud Logging or EoS notifications as planning tools, only mentions 'Monitor EoS notifications' without specifying the mechanism

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command for deprecation insights: 'gcloud recommender insights list --insight-type=google.container.DiagnosisInsight' and mentions checking deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about 'snowflaking' or mention security/reliability risks of manually freezing versions, though it does recommend proactive upgrades
